title: Onkerma sphaerocarpa

preparations: Unfortunately, I couldn't find any information on herbal preparations related to Onkerma sphaerocarpa.
intro: Onkerma sphaerocarpa, also known as Sphaerocarpos, is a small, non-vascular liverwort species that belongs to the family Sphaerocarpaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, contributing to its potential in treating various health issues such as wound healing, fever reduction, and immune system support. Bioactive constituents of Onkerma sphaerocarpa include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Onkerma sphaerocarpa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
